questionHtml:
Which process explains the observations shown in the images?

A. Active transport

B. Exocytosis

C. Facilitated diffusion

D. Osmosis

meta.title: Which process explains the observations shown in the images? A. Active transport B. Exocytosis C. Facilitated diffusion D. Osmosis
